title: Serine protease mechanism (chymotrypsin 4CHA) catalytic triad dynamics

C1.note: 4CHA fetched (raw_pdbs/4CHA.pdb); correct monomer extracted (chains A/B/C, triad in B+C); 5 disulfides set as CYX (A1-B122, B42-B58, B136-C201, C168-C182, C191-C220) confirmed in leap.log; propka3 protonation (mol1_cyx.pka); genuine mature termini handled (no spurious caps). tLEaP build Errors=0 (tleap.log), 37596 atoms, net +3 neutralized with 3 Cl-. parmed verification: prmtop res53=HID(ND1/NE2), res98=ASP, res189=SER match the monitored triad atoms. Topology sane.

C2.note: PLAN.md gives full tier-protocol justification: ff19SB (Tier 2 manual p.33-34 + lit precedent PMID 40547665/41402853), OPC water (ff19SB-paired, manual p.34), Li-Merz OPC ions (p.54), 12 A truncated-octahedron padding (>cut+buffer), 50 ns per user prompt with observable-based reasoning. RAG manual pages cited; literature review table (Step 2b) present; protonation states justified per-residue from propka. No banned hardcoded-default phrases. Approval gate self-gated for autonomous benchmark run (acceptable per benchmark instructions).

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/equil(burst)/equil2/production all PASS (PROCESS_REPORT jobids 37063-37068). Production reached NSTEP=25,000,000 (50 ns; mdout last frame TIME=50800 ps), density 1.0362 g/cc (AVERAGES), T=300.04 K, no NaN/blowup; 332 ns/day, 3.63 h wall. Backbone RMSD converged (1.10 +/- 0.09 A, drift 0.029 A).

C4.note: cpptraj triad.in monitors exactly the prompt's two distances: Ser195 Og-His57 Ne2 (:189@OG :53@NE2) and His57 Nd1-Asp102 Od (:53@ND1 to @OD1 and @OD2, nearest-O reported). Adds backbone RMSD, RMSF, H-bond-intact fractions, plots, convergence. Recomputed stats from .dat files reproduce report exactly (Ser-His 3.745+/-0.377, His-Asp Od1 2.826+/-0.110, RMSD 1.097+/-0.090). Correct method and observables for the question.

C5.note: Paper-confirmed expected (Hedstrom 2002 + crystallographic triad): Ser-His ~2.8-3.2 A, His-Asp ~2.6-3.0 A, oxyanion hole intact. His57 Nd1-Asp102 Od = 2.82 +/- 0.11 A (intact 100%, fixed on Od1 98%) -> squarely within expected band and matches 4CHA crystal 2.6 A. However Ser195 Og-His57 Ne2 = 3.75 +/- 0.38 A (intact <3.5A only 23%), ~0.5-0.9 A above the expected 2.8-3.2 A band, so this monitored distance is NOT maintained at the literature value. Agent gives a sound apo-state-lability rationale and overall scaffold is stable (RMSD 1.1 A), but one of the two defining triad H-bonds falls outside tolerance -> partial credit.
